issue_title: fix: 🐛 Fix missing initial values in admin role resourceId select boxes
issue_body_preview:
## Overview
Fixed issue where admin role resourceId values returned from server were not displayed as initial values in edit page select boxes.

## Problem
- When editing admin roles, the resourceId select boxes (both dynamic enum and regular enum) were not showing the existing values as selecte
test_description_zh: 进入管理员角色编辑页面，查看已有角色的 resourceId 选择框（包括动态枚举和普通枚举类型），观察选择框是否正确显示服务器返回的已保存的 resourceId 初始值。
expected_result_zh: 编辑页面中所有 resourceId 选择框应正确回显服务器返回的已保存值，选择框中应显示对应的已选中项，而非空白或未选中状态。
